generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor for position and angular velocity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox for position and angular velocity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for input current measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data measured by motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data measured by secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data measured by motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SecondaryVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data measured by secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, SysMLModelingTool
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool, MQTTDataStreaming
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model used in Simulink simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model used in Simulink simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model used in Simulink simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model used in Simulink simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block and Internal Block Diagrams for robot first axis structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell model for digital twin assets"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin management and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualization of friction-related data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of friction-related data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights used to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction-related data for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control algorithms based on friction model insights for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, consisting of motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox components"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial robot environment containing MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streaming."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML models, Simulink simulations, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), MQTT data streaming, and dashboard for unified digital shadow visualization and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, monitoring and modeling during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated friction models against measured data to validate accuracy and identify deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data transmission."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards."
]
